Seminars

CeDEx China runs a regular Brown Bag seminar series during teaching semesters (typically 12:30-14:00).

Recent Seminars

Date Speaker Affiliation Title
8 April 2026 Dr Tom Lane Newcastle Business School Law and Norms in Multicultural Societies
28 January 2026 Professor Jaimie W. Lien Shandong University Self-Commitment for Cooperation
28 January 2026 Professor Jie Zheng Shandong University Strategic Commitment and Legal Enforcement in Dynamic Matching
19 November 2025 Dr Xiaoqi Xu Southwestern University of Finance and Economics Entry Deterrence Through Strategic Trading
12 November 2025 Mr Bozhong Zheng Tsinghua University Form vs Information: The Regimes of Data Property Rights
5 November 2025 Dr Yige Duan Shanghai Jiao Tong University Beyond Lost Earnings: Job Displacement and the Cost of Commuting

To update this table, edit _data/seminars.yml in the repository.
